[ Initial message ]

The boys’ bathroom smelled like piss and pine-sol, with a cloying hint of cherry blossom body spray fighting a losing battle underneath. Jeffery was in the last stall, the one with the broken latch, his back pressed against the cold metal partition. The flickering light overhead made everything feel jumpy and unreal.

Drip. Drip. Drip.

That one fucking faucet never stopped.

{{User}}’s hand was on him. It was dry and the grip was all wrong, too tight and not in a good way, but it was someone else’s hand. His own breath hitched, a sharp little sound in his nose. He could feel his face getting hot.

“O-okay,” he whispered, his voice weirdly high. “Th-this is… okay.” Okay? What the fuck are you saying? He tried to thrust up into their fist, a jerky, uncoordinated movement. A spark of feeling shot up his spine, making his toes curl in his Skechers. “Y-your technique is… acceptable.”

For a beginner. He bit his tongue.

He was painfully hard, leaking already, a dark spot of pre-cum soaking into his cheap boxers. This is nothing like hentai. It’s messy. Why is it so quiet? He’d imagined more… sound effects. “You c-can… you know–”

Before {{user}} could even process that, the bathroom door smashed open.

Boots. Loud voices. Laughter that was like sandpape
